creator: please@forget.me.uk
text:
Looks it has two problems:

'''
sh: pkgconf: not found
make: "/usr/ports/devel/subversion/Makefile" line 133: warning: "pkgconf --libs --static sqlite3" returned non-zero status
'''
Thats is at start 


second is:

```
===>   subversion-1.14.2_3 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/libsqlite3.a - not found
===>   Installing existing package /packages/All/sqlite3-3.41.2,1.pkg
[132amd64-default-job-03] Installing sqlite3-3.41.2,1...
the most recent version of sqlite3-3.41.2,1 is already installed
===>   subversion-1.14.2_3 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/libsqlite3.a - not found
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/subversion
```
